_comment: AI Employee Gold Tier — MCP Server Configuration
_usage: Use with: claude --mcp-config mcp.json  (from Gold Tier directory)
_social_note: Twitter, Facebook, Instagram use Playwright scripts directly — no MCP needed

email._comment: Email MCP — sends/drafts Gmail via Google API
email._setup: Set EMAIL_MCP_PATH in .env to the absolute path of your email MCP server's index.js
email._disable: Leave EMAIL_MCP_PATH unset to disable (system degrades gracefully)

erpnext._comment: ERPNext MCP — accounting CRUD via ERPNext REST API
erpnext._setup: cd ERP_Next-MCP && uv sync && cp .env.example .env (fill credentials)

browser._comment: Browser MCP — web automation for form-filling, ad-hoc scraping
